scripts.assets: bun -e 'import sharp from "sharp"; const s=Buffer.from(await Bun.file("assets/icon.svg").arrayBuffer()); await sharp(s,{density:384}).resize(1024,1024).png().toFile("assets/icon.png"); const bg=`<svg width="2732" height="2732" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="2732" height="2732" fill="#0b0b10"/></svg>`; const c=await sharp(s,{density:384}).resize(820,820).png().toBuffer(); for (const f of ["splash","splash-dark"]) await sharp(Buffer.from(bg)).composite([{input:c,gravity:"center"}]).png().toFile(`assets/${f}.png`);' && capacitor-assets generate --ios && cap sync ios
scripts.ios: CAPACITOR_LIVE_RELOAD=true cap sync ios && cap open ios
scripts.ios:prod: VITE_API_URL=https://eos-backend-todoroappatma-4183s-projects.vercel.app vite build && cap sync ios && cap open ios
